name: CASIN
summary: Small-molecule Cdc42 inhibitor tracked for preclinical hematopoietic stem-cell rejuvenation, mouse lifespan and epigenetic-age signals, and ex vivo human HSC repolarization.
mechanism_summary: Inhibits Cdc42 signaling, a polarity and cytoskeletal regulator implicated in aged hematopoietic stem-cell function and associated epigenetic-marker changes.

open_questions: Whether systemic Cdc42 inhibition can be made safe and selective in humans
Whether ex vivo aged human HSC repolarization predicts treated-human benefit
Whether mouse lifespan and DNA-methylation signals replicate across sex, strain, and dose
